title: main-critical-sonar-remediation local gate green
body: Moonless Vanishing Lantern closed the generated MCP executor stop point. The generator now emits concrete per-tool invocation helpers with literal switch delegation, generated files remain inside lint/Sonar surfaces, core MCP tool aliases were not touched, response-map type contract extraction removed the depcruise cycle, plan/thread/napkin surfaces are updated, and full root pnpm check passed after the surface updates. Pausing for fresh-session continuation.
